title: William Lee sees Fed on hold, backs India as long
description: William Lee, Chief Economist and Managing Director of Global Economic Advisors explains why he expects the Fed to remain on hold, warns that West Asia tensions could keep oil prices elevated, discusses the artificial intelligence (AI) trade, and outlines why he prefers India's long-term growth story over investing in gold.
content:

title: China Takes the Helm: Xi's Vision for Global AI Leadership
description: In a keynote at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference, President Xi Jinping positioned China as a leader in global AI governance. Xi emphasized open-source technology as a public good, pledging support to developing nations. He compared AI's importance to groundbreaking inventions and proposed China's AI initiatives as alternatives to U.S. policies.
content: At the World Artificial Intelligence Conference in Shanghai, Chinese President Xi Jinping outlined China's ambitions to lead global AI governance. He advocated for open-source technology, highlighting its potential to empower developing nations while... [721 chars]

title: SBS Japanese Weekly News Wrap Friday 17 July
description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese this week unveiled a new national regulatory framework for the Artificial Intelligence industry. United Nations is again urging all parties to de-escalate and return to diplomacy in the ongoing conflict between Iran and the United States in the Middle East. And following the child sexual abuse case at a Sydney childcare centre, the Australian Federal Police are appealing for information to help identify potential victims.

title: Xi Jinping's Vision for People-Centric AI
description: Chinese President Xi Jinping highlighted the necessity of focusing on people in AI development during the World Artificial Intelligence Conference in Shanghai. He outlined China's commitment to equitable AI capacity building globally, emphasizing collaboration with international bodies to ensure fair access to AI opportunities, particularly for developing countries.

title: China’s Xi Jinping addresses World AI Conference as US tech rivalry heats up
description: President’s personal attendance seen as a sign of China’s inclusion of artificial intelligence into broader geopolitical strategy.
content:

title: Global Times: 300 plus AI products set to make their global debuts at WAIC with strong focus on practical applications
description: BEIJING, July 17, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- In Shanghai, the final countdown to one of the world's largest artificial intelligence (AI) events has entered its last stage. Inside the exhibition halls, interactive screens are being tested, robotic arms are undergoing repeated adjustments, and engineers are making final preparations before thousands of AI products meet global visitors, the Global Times observed while walking through the exhibition halls on Thursday.
